name: site-verifier
description: Site Verifier is a browser extension designed to protect users from phishing and homograph (IDN) attacks. It automatically detects if the website you are visiting belongs to a list of verified domains.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist');" && bestzip dist/site-verifier.zip manifest.json background.js verifier.js icons/ sites.json
